title: ilex costata
intro: Ilex costata, also known as Chinese Holly, is a plant species that belongs to the Aquifoliaceae family, characterized by its holly-like leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. Ilex costata has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Ilex costata typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
